promoted_facts.fact: Business Developers receive approximately one-half of initial franchise fee and up to one-third of royalties, transfer fees, and extension fees
SFAFT 2024 spending breakdown: 41.1% national media, 7.3% media production, 10.1% R&D, 30.3% digital, 11.2% other
Company sold 139 restaurants in 2024 ranging $1 to $56,500; affiliates sold 32 ranging $1 to $26,798.78
Municipality may assess impact fees $5,000-$25,000 on restaurant location
52% of 2024 openings were reopenings of previously closed locations
Franchisor may earn profit from sublease spread between master lease and sublease rent
Insurance must be purchased through Gold Standard Insurance Program; EFT payments required
Sub Club reimbursement: 30.9% of $2 Rewards and Surprise Rewards redeemed
Catering (ezCater): ~5% ezOrdering or ~13% Marketplace + ~2.75% credit card processing
Post-termination: franchisee liable for balance of rent due under Sublease AND master lease
Franchisor may establish marketing assistance fund from royalties of certain large non-traditional operators
